data_gaps.challenge: Limited online presence for Gwadar restaurants
issues: Most restaurants do not have verified Google Business listings
Phone numbers difficult to verify for many establishments
Operating hours not publicly available for most restaurants
Menus and pricing information not standardized online
Ratings and reviews limited in online databases
data_gaps.recommendation: For complete accurate data, direct contact with restaurants is necessary

instructions_for_rag_training.note: This JSON contains ONLY verified information
use_only: Known menu items from verified mentions
do_not_use: Empty fields (null values) - indicates unverified data
instructions_for_rag_training.suggestion: Collect additional data directly from restaurants via phone calls or field visits for comprehensive chatbot training

how_to_improve_this_data: Call verified phone numbers to get current hours, menus, and pricing
Visit restaurants to photograph menus and ambiance
Request restaurant websites or social media pages
Collect Google Maps reviews and ratings
Document specialties and best dishes through direct interviews
